What we do

From the ground up
— to the finish.

A complete building service for domestic and commercial clients. We project-manage every job from start to finish so you only ever have one point of contact.

01 / Domestic

House Extensions

Single and two-storey extensions designed to add real space and value — from initial groundworks through to final decoration.

Enquire about extensions
02 / Domestic

New Build Developments

Full new-build homes constructed to the highest specification, from foundations and groundworks to handover-ready finish.

Enquire about new builds
03 / Commercial

Commercial Builds

Commercial developments, office fit-outs and shell-and-core works delivered to programme for businesses across Derbyshire.

Enquire about commercial work
04 / Domestic

Refurbishments

Full property renovations and refurbishments — internal remodels, kitchens, bathrooms and complete makeovers, finished to a high standard.

Enquire about refurbishments
05 / Domestic

Loft Conversions

Convert unused loft space into bedrooms, bathrooms or home offices — fully project-managed from structural work through to decoration.

Enquire about loft conversions
06 / External

Groundworks & External

Foundations, drainage, boundary walls, driveways, patios and external works — the unseen detail that makes every build solid.

Enquire about external work

Why work with us

A team you can
actually rely on.

As a Belper-based building company, we welcome enquiries from across Derby and the surrounding Derbyshire area. No job is too big or too small — every client gets the same standard of work.

Start your project
01

Project managed start to finish

One point of contact for the whole build. We coordinate trades, scheduling, materials and inspections so you don't have to chase anyone.

02

All trades under one roof

Qualified electricians, gas safe plumbers, joiners, brick layers, plasterers, ground workers, decorators, roofers and landscapers — all available through us.

03

Delivered to budget

Clear, written quotes upfront and projects delivered to the agreed price. No surprises halfway through the build.

04

Established & trusted local trader

Over 30 years of building experience across Derbyshire, with a long track record of clients who recommend us to friends and family.

05

Mess kept to a minimum

Our team are polite, considerate and keep the disruption to your home and routine as low as possible during the build.

In their words

What clients say
about working with us.

Real reviews from real Derbyshire homeowners.

"
I employed Kev Smithurst builders to build a complete stone Annex at my property in Ambergate. Kev and his team completed the whole project from start to finish and I'm absolutely delighted with the finished result. The build quality is superb and blends into the listed building at the side of it seamlessly. All staff were polite, considerate, incredibly hard working and kept the mess and disruption down to a minimum. The project was delivered to the agreed budget and I personally can't recommend Kev and his highly skilled team enough.
Ray Walters
Ambergate, Derbyshire
Facebook Review
"
Kev, Paul and all of the team are reliable and have certainly always exceeded our expectations. They've done a brilliant job with several separate extensions on our house, as well as several work properties too. We wouldn't hesitate to recommend them to others. Thanks again all.

FAQ

Questions
we get asked.

Short answers to the things people most want to know before getting in touch. If yours isn't here, just call us.

Where are you based and what areas do you cover?

We're based in Belper, Derbyshire and cover Derby and the surrounding Derbyshire area — including Ripley, Alfreton, Ambergate, Matlock, Bakewell, Heanor, Duffield and Kilburn. If you're a little further out, give us a call and we'll usually still come and quote.

How long has K. Smithurst Building Contractors been trading?

We've been building across Derbyshire for over 30 years. The business is a limited company registered in England & Wales (Reg No. 04362330) and a member of the Federation of Small Businesses.

Do you provide written quotes?

Yes — every project gets a clear, itemised written quote with no obligation. We come to site, talk through what you want, and come back with a detailed proposal covering labour, materials and timeline.

Are all trades in-house?

Yes. Bricklayers, joiners, gas-safe plumbers, qualified electricians, plasterers, ground workers, decorators, roofers and landscapers — all available through us. One point of contact, one team, one finished project.

Is K. Smithurst Building Contractors insured?

Yes — we carry full public liability insurance and as a limited company we're properly registered and compliant. We're happy to share evidence on request.

Belper-based building contractors with over 30 years of experience across Derbyshire. House extensions, new builds, loft conversions, refurbishments and groundworks — every project managed from start to finish.
